rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Shells Modifying Files in Known Linux Kernel Modules Directories

rules.rule_text:
title: Shells Modifying Files in Known Linux Kernel Modules Directories
id: 173fa93c-88ce-4d3f-89de-cfc849a94821
status: experimental
description: "Detects configuration files being written to specific directories that\
  \ are searched when \nlooking for loadable Linux Kernel Modules (LKM). Part of the\
  \ RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection \nReport.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/kernel-modules-and-extensions/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1547
- attack.t1547.006
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - /bash
    - /sh
    - /dash
    - /zsh
    TargetFilename|contains:
    - /lib/modules/*/
    - /etc/modules-load.d/
    - /lib/modules-load.d/
    - /usr/lib/modules-load.d/
    - /usr/local/lib/modules-load.d/
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
